title: Vanguard A.C
description: My first plugin... This is an anti-cheat plugin with moderation features.
body: Vanguard is an advanced anticheat and moderation plugin designed to offer maximum protection and control within multiplayer servers. Thanks to an intelligent detection system, it is able to identify anomalous behavior, cheating use, exploits and unfair practices in real time, automatically intervening with targeted sanctions such as kicks, temporary or permanent bans, mutes and personalized alerts. Its moderation module allows administrators to act accurately and quickly, managing infractions through intuitive commands and simplified dashboards.
